title: Request to fetch boards is failing

posts.author: toshetah (Tomer)
posts.cookedHtml:
I am running the following query:

query QuerySharedBoards ($limit: Int, $page: Int) {
	boards (limit: $limit, page: $page, board_kind: share) {
		creator {
			account {
				slug
			}
			id
		}
	}
}

I get the following error:

input: Cannot return null for non-nullable field Board.creator

According to the latest schema at:

GraphQL API

Boards

monday.com boards are where users input all of their data, making them one of the core platform components. Items (rows), groups (groups of rows), and columns comprise the board's structure, and the board's data is stored in items and their...

and at:
https://api.monday.com/v2/get_schema

the creator should be mandatory.

Can you please help?

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @toshetah,

We have a topic about this. You can follow this issue here

Cheers,
Matias

posts.author: foresty (Forest)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Matias,

I see the issue has apparently been fixed in the other thread, but I’m still getting this error as well. Any ideas? Thanks!

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @foresty,

And welcome to the community!

Cheers,
